payload.summary: Planned a fleet-wide, multi-vendor usage-statistics dashboard modeled on phuryn/claude-usage but reusing the coordinator Postgres instead of SQLite. Operator selected Approach 2 (coordinator-backed, vendor-adapter collector, kanban-viz frontend) at Gate 1.

decisions.title: Reuse coordinator Postgres over SQLite
decisions.rationale: SQLite cannot do the operator-selected fleet-wide aggregation and duplicates migration/query machinery the repo already has (migration 026_usage_stats.sql).

decisions.title: Vendor-adapter core with normalized UsageRecord
decisions.rationale: Storage/pricing/API/UI operate only on UsageRecord; adding a vendor is one file. Quarantines Gemini's OTEL paradigm to one adapter.

decisions.title: Idempotency on (vendor, session_id, record_hash) + per-file watermark
decisions.rationale: DB UNIQUE constraint plus usage_ingest_state watermark = incremental, re-runnable ingestion.

decisions.title: Pricing seeded from agents.yaml
decisions.rationale: Same registry vendor_health.py reads; known-model set cannot drift; unknown models persist with null cost.

decisions.title: Session-end hook ingestion with offline spool
decisions.rationale: Automatic, near-real-time; offline spool bounds the coordinator-coupling data-loss risk.

decisions.title: Dashboard mirrors useCoordinator.ts
decisions.rationale: useUsage.ts copies kanban-viz Bearer+SSE+polling pattern; consistent observability surface in apps/.

next_steps: On Gate 2 approval, seed coordinator issues, then /implement-feature usage-stats-multi-model starting with wp-contracts -> wp-migration.
